name: SuperSwings ProShop
address: 1193 W Morena Blvd, San Diego, CA 92110
about: SuperSwings ProShop is a golf simulator venue and custom club fitting studio in San Diego, CA. It offers a data-driven, tour-level club fitting and building experience within a precision-engineered facility, using technology to optimize every swing for measurable results. The venue provides services including simulator play, custom club builds, repairs, restorations, golf instruction, and TPI fitness assessments, blending modern analytics with craftsmanship.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-grade Foresight Falcon simulators trusted by PGA professionals
Private, state-of-the-art performance studio with precision calibration tools
Data-driven fitting and building experience with measurable results
Blend of modern analytics and master craftsman's touch

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end simulator trusted by PGA professionals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but SuperSwings also offers club rentals and custom fitting services if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so it's recommended to check with the venue directly regarding outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round typically take?
faq.answer: No specific time estimate for 18 holes is provided, but simulator play time can vary based on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is SuperSwings kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendliness or junior programs is mentioned on the website.
